settings.title: — A DEVOTED, HUMBLE STUDENT OF SELF-MASTERY

settings.editor: Two-time World's Best Personal Trainer. Fitness Hall of Fame. Three decades teaching heart-driven leaders to live like a lion — body, mind, and the work that follows. Where the mind goes, the body follows.

For over three decades, Billy Beck III has been at the forefront of self-mastery — guiding champions, founders, Hollywood talent, and heart-driven leaders out of fearful-lamb living and into the body, the work, and the legacy they were built for. The methodology is uncompromising. The approach is sacred. The results — documented.

Twice crowned World's Best Personal Trainer by MET-Rx — a distinction won against the top trainers on the planet. Inducted into the Fitness Hall of Fame. Named Trainer of the Year by industry peers. Featured in Muscle & Fitness, Men's Health, GQ, Rolling Stone, and on ABC, NBC, CBS, and FOX.

But the real story isn't the accolades — it's the thousand-plus people who refused limitation, kept their word to themselves, and used the body as proof that the rest of their life could change too. The body is the proving ground. Self-mastery is the source.
Periodized resistance training engineered for hypertrophy, strength, and injury resilience — calibrated to age, history, and goal.
Real food, real macros, ruthless simplicity. Zero fads. Fuel for the work — calibrated to age, history, and the life you're building.
Focus, identity, repetition. Where the mind goes the body follows. Train the inner game first — the outer transformation becomes inevitable.

settings.title: Private studio opens in South Florida.

settings.editor: Billy Beck III opens his flagship studio, pioneering one-on-one training built around periodized protocols, hands-on correction, and zero gimmicks.

settings.title: MET-Rx crowns him the first time.

settings.editor: Beats out the top trainers on the planet in the MET-Rx World's Best Personal Trainer Contest — a title decided on results, not popularity.
Wins the World's Best title a second time — the only trainer to repeat the feat. Cements his position as the standard-bearer of the craft.
Releases Lean & Mean — fat-burning secrets of the World's Best Personal Trainer. Becomes a top-seller in the fitness category on Amazon.
Inducted into the Fitness Hall of Fame for a sustained, industry-shaping body of work across coaching, publishing, and athlete development.
Practiced daily. Compounded for life. The unsexy daily actions that install identity and make transformation inevitable. Discipline is not punishment. Discipline is freedom.
The body is the proving ground. Show up first, talk later.
Real food, real macros, ruthless simplicity. No fads, no shame.
Recovery is the work. Same hours, every night, no apologies.
Walk, breathe, mobilize daily. Sitting is the new smoking.
Water before coffee. Half your body weight in ounces, every day.
Devoted, humble student of the craft. The mind sets the ceiling.
Lions lead. Daily contribution before personal consumption.
Three wins. One lesson. The day named, claimed, and put to bed.
